resources.string:
1. Pair your Flipper Zero in Android Bluetooth settings (one-time, accept the PIN on both devices).
2. Tap Start bridge. The bridge listens on 127.0.0.1:9876 and stays in the notification tray.
3. Open the Flipper Mirror app on your glasses. The bridge auto-connects to the bonded Flipper the moment the glasses app opens — status walks Scanning → Connecting → Connected.
4. Status above stays live: state on top, the linked Flipper below, and a running frames/skips count.

Desktop dev only: with the phone on USB, run "adb forward tcp:9876 tcp:9876" and point the simulator webapp at ws://127.0.0.1:9876/ws.
Manual d-pad (routed through BLE if connected)
